data.title: TrailIntel Acquires GPS Trailmasters Software Platform to Advance Next-Generation Outdoor Navigation
data.description: A major development has occurred that greatly enhances the options for users, offering a more robust, interconnected, and adaptable navigation system on Garmin, Mobile, and Web platforms. This breakthrough is set in STRONG, Maine, on April 23, 2026. TrailIntel, a key player in the industry, is behind this innovation.

data.title: The Missing LINK: Introducing LINK.2.1 and LINK.2.2 from L.A.B. Golf
data.description: L.A.B. Golf has unveiled the newest models, LINK.2.1 and LINK.2.2, which are the first heel-shafted blade putters to incorporate Lie Angle Balance technology. This innovation was introduced on April 23, 2026, in CRESWELL, Oregon. L.A.B. Golf is well-known for its pioneering work in this area, and the latest additions mark a significant advancement in putting technology. These putters offer a distinct design that caters to golfers seeking improved performance on the greens.

data.title: CareScout Joins Ensight™ Intelligent Quote LTC & Life Marketplace
data.description: Ensight, a prominent digital sales acceleration platform specializing in life, long-term care (LTC), and annuity insurance, revealed today that CareScout Care Assurance, the first-ever long-term care insurance offering by CareScout Insurance Company (CareScout), has been integrated into its Intelligent platform. This move signifies a major development for the insurance sector, providing customers with increased access to long-term care coverage. With CareScout Care Assurance now accessible through Ensight's platform, individuals seeking comprehensive insurance solutions can benefit from the advanced features and offerings available. This strategic partnership aims to cater to the growing demand for long-term care insurance, ensuring broader coverage and support for policyholders. The collaboration between Ensight and CareScout underscores their commitment to innovation and enhancing insurance services for clients. This milestone signifies a significant step forward for the industry, leveraging technology to streamline insurance processes and make valuable products more widely available.

data.title: Jack in the Box Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast
data.description: Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) has scheduled its JACK Q2 2026 Earnings Webcast for Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 5 p.m. EDT. The event can be accessed through live webcast at investors.jackinthebox.com. For more information, individuals can contact Rachel Webb, the Vice President of Finance and Investor Relations at (858) 522-4556. The Q2 2026 Earnings Release will be distributed after the market closes on the same day. Additionally, the webcast will be archived on the Jack in the Box investor relations website for future playback.

data.title: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. First Quarter 2026 Results Webcast Date and Time
data.description: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) will conduct a webcast to review its first-quarter results for the period ended March 31, 2026. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, May 20, 2026, following the market opening. CEO Luis Raganato and senior management will lead the discussion, starting with introductory comments and then moving on to a Q&A session. The webcast will be accessible to members of the investment community, with Google Chrome being the recommended browser for participation.

data.title: Help Desk Migration Delivers Enterprise Zendesk to Salesforce Agentforce Migration for Pandora
data.description: In Ternopil, Ukraine on April 23, 2026, Help Desk Migration, an automated service provided by Relokia, has effectively overseen a significant enterprise data migration for the renowned global retail company, Pandora. This project involved transitioning over 1.2 million customer service records from Zendesk to Salesforce's Agentforce (Service Cloud) platform.

data.title: RIMAN Connects APAC Markets in Macau Through Strategy, Innovation, and New Product Reveal
data.description: A company focused on K-beauty skincare and wellness, RIMAN, recently wrapped up its "2026 RIMAN Convention Macau" in Seoul, South Korea. The event took place from April 17th to 19th at The Londoner Macao and attracted approximately 2,000 attendees, including members and leaders.
Highest ever production level and significant increase in cash flow in the last quarter.

data.title: NextEra Energy first-quarter 2026 financial results available on company's website
data.description: NextEra Energy, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: NEE), has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The information can be accessed on the company's official website at www.NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults. Executives from the company's senior management team are scheduled to discuss these results. It is worth noting that the announcement was made in Juno Beach, Florida on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. Declares Quarterly Distribution of $0.325 per Common Unit
data.description: Whippany, New Jersey - On April 23, 2026, Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. revealed through a press release that a dividend of $0.325 per Common Unit has been established by its Board of Supervisors for the period ending on March 28, 2026. This dividend marks the quarterly distribution rate for the company and signifies...

data.title: WALOVI Signs Deals in Portugal & Spain, Moves from Scattered Footprints to Regional Deepening
data.description: In Lisbon, Portugal and Madrid, on April 23, 2026, Chinese companies are taking advantage of the rising trend in health-conscious consumption and the flourishing botanical beverage industry in Europe. Guangzhou WALOVI Great Health Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of GPHL, participated in an event from April 19 to 22 to capitalize on these opportunities. This development highlights the significant growth potential of the market, with notable increases in the demand for health-oriented products and botanical beverages.
INFOSYS SEES FY REV. +1.5% TO +3.5%, EST. +4.9%

data.title: Cross Country Appoints Darrick Sogabe as Chief Product Officer, Advancing the Company’s Growing Technology Portfolio
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, Cross Country has appointed Darrick Sogabe as the Chief Product Officer, signaling the firm's dedication to enhancing its technology offerings. This move underscores Cross Country's strategy to advance its technology portfolio.

data.title: Freshfields and Anthropic Team Up to Co-Build AI Legal Workflows, Deploying Claude Across the Firm Globally
data.description: In a collaborative effort, global law firm Freshfields and Anthropic, a prominent AI research and technology company, have entered into a multi-year partnership aimed at expediting AI co-innovation and widespread integration within the firm. Through this agreement, Freshfields has granted 5,700 employees access to Claude, Anthropic's cutting-edge AI models. This access is facilitated through Freshfields' in-house general AI platform, ensuring secure and ethical usage. The primary goal of this collaboration is to develop innovative AI legal workflows. Notably, within the initial six weeks of implementation, the adoption of this AI technology has shown promising progress.

data.title: Aramark Enters Hyperscale AI Data Center Market With Launch of New Integrated Hospitality Platform: Multi-Year Engagement with Top Global Hyperscaler Underway
data.description: In Philadelphia today, global developments in hyperscale AI data centers are rapidly progressing. Aramark (NYSE: ARMK) has introduced Aramark Nexus™, a groundbreaking platform aiming to combine hospitality and workforce assistance for hyperscale AI data centers and vast remote operational settings. This initiative comes as a response to the increased demand for such services worldwide. Aramark has secured a significant contract with a prominent hyperscale entity to deliver inclusive hospitality and facility amenities at various AI data center sites over a lengthy span of time.

data.title: Realbotix to Showcase Humanoid Robot at Bitcoin 2026 Conference
data.description: Realbotix Corp. will be presenting a humanoid robot at the Bitcoin 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. The Company, listed on TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF, specializes in human-centric AI technology. The event will be held from April 27 to 29 at The Venetian Resort. CEO Andrew Kiguel expressed that while AI is commonly seen on screens, Realbotix aims to provide a human-like interaction with AI in service sector jobs. This move signifies the company's commitment to advancing AI technology in real-world applications.

data.title: ‘There’s a Tweed for That’: Canopy Growth Announces Tweed Brand Summer Campaign
data.description: In Smith Falls, Ontario, Canopy Growth Corporation revealed a makeover of Tweed, a prominent cannabis brand in Canada. The company, listed as (TSX: WEED) and (Nasdaq: CGC), launched a nationwide summer initiative called "There's a Tweed for That." Addressing a common issue in the Canadian flower market, where consumers had to purchase products without seeing them, Tweed introduced new window bags for their flower products. This update allows customers to have a clear look at the items they are purchasing.

data.title: Sanborn Achieves SOC 2 Type 2 Attestation for Second Consecutive Year, Expanding Scope Across Private Cloud and Google Cloud (GCP)
data.description: Sanborn, a prominent geospatial solutions provider based in Colorado Springs, has recently achieved the successful completion of its SOC 2 Type 2 audit for the second consecutive year. This prestigious accomplishment underscores the company's commitment to upholding high standards of security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy of data. By meeting the stringent criteria set forth in the audit, Sanborn has demonstrated its dedication to providing reliable and secure geospatial services to its clients. This achievement highlights Sanborn's ongoing efforts to ensure the protection of sensitive information and reinforces its position as a trusted leader in the industry.
